RunPolicyConfig.description: RunPolicyConfig is schema-friendly policy model for config files.

exclude.description: Exclude stores optional global exclude path patterns.

fail_on.description:
FailOn defines minimum diagnostic severity that fails run result.
Empty value defaults to "error".

rules.description:
Rules stores ordered selector-based rule settings.
Later entries override earlier entries.

soft_unknown_selectors.description:
SoftUnknownSelectors enables soft mode for unknown selectors.
Default false means unknown selectors fail build/compile.

RunPolicyRuleConfig.description: RunPolicyRuleConfig is one ordered rule policy entry.

enabled.description: Enabled overrides rule enable state when set.

exclude.description: Exclude stores optional path patterns where this entry is not applied.

options.description: Arbitrary rule options payload for runner-specific behavior.

rule.description:
Rule is rule selector token.
Supported forms: `*`, `<module>.*`, `<module>.<scope>.*`, `<rule-id>`, `<CODE>`.

severity.description: Severity overrides effective diagnostic severity when set.
